# Transcrição: 11. Outreach Which Strategy

- **Fonte:** 11. Outreach Which Strategy
- **Duração:** 02:16

## [00:00 - 02:16]

Okay, so we're going to be looking at how to essentially attract or go after the type of leads that you want to be working with. Now this is all about prospecting and some of the strategies that we're going to be looking at include going on Upwork and building a profile on there, using other directory resources that are actually available to you, establishing authority in the marketplace and leveraging those case studies that you have and essentially how to do that. And we're also going to look at strategic partnerships and how to just reach out to the perfect clients that you have on your dream list. The first thing that you want to do is get super clear on who it is that you can help. Now remember when we talked about client success, part of that was identifying what do they need and what do you excel at that can really take what they're trying to do right now to the next level. Understanding that position that you take in the marketplace will really help you to attract the right types of people. If you don't know that, if you're kind of just willing to work with anybody and offer any service out there, you're going to get all kinds of colorful personalities coming into your business and some will wreck tremendous havoc on you and your growth, sorry, whatever you're trying to achieve right now in your freelancing business. So it's important that we hone in on exactly what makes a good client for you and everyone's going to have different answers for that because everyone has different goals, everyone's had different definitions of what success is and everyone has different wants and needs of the lifestyle that they seek. For example, maybe it is that you gain clarity that, hey, I can only really help people if they have XYZ already in place. So maybe they need to have a website in place already or they need to have a Facebook page and some followers in place. Whatever that is, get really clear on that because once you have that, these strategies that we're going to show you will just count compound tenfold and really, really help you build something that you feel proud about but that also fulfills you in many more ways than just professionally.
